i: Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Carbamoyl phosphate synthetase' which is the encoded protein of this gene) with standard 8-item set. PC encodes pyruvate carboxylase.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items with oxygen-binding protein categories that hint at the encoded protein) with standard 8-item set. NGB encodes neuroglobin, an oxygen-binding protein expressed in brain neurons.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Fumarase' which is the encoded protein of FH) with standard 8-item set. FH encodes fumarate hydratase (fumarase); mutations cause hereditary leiomyomatosis and renal cell cancer.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Glucose-dependent insulinotropic peptide' which is the encoded protein of GIP) with standard 8-item set. GIP encodes gastric inhibitory polypeptide (glucose-dependent insulinotropic peptide), an incretin hormone.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Serum albumin' which is the protein product) with standard 8-item set. Note: 'blood albumin' is typically referred to as the ALB gene (albumin gene); the statement is about the gene coding for albumin.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 7 items including protein-function categories) with standard 8-item set. SRC encodes the Src tyrosine kinase, a proto-oncogene; v-Src is the viral oncogene that causes Rous sarcoma.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Argininosuccinate lyase' which is the encoded protein of ASL) with standard 8-item set. ASL mutations cause argininosuccinic aciduria.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Carbamoyl phosphate synthetase' which is the encoded protein of CPS1) with standard 8-item set. CPS1 mutations cause carbamoyl phosphate synthetase 1 deficiency (urea cycle disorder).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 5 items) with standard 8-item set. C9 encodes complement component 9, the terminal complement cascade protein forming the membrane attack complex.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Collagen type VIII' which is the encoded protein) with standard 8-item set. COL8A1 encodes collagen type VIII alpha-1 chain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 receptor-function items) with standard 8-item set. LRP1 encodes low-density lipoprotein receptor-related protein 1, involved in lipoprotein uptake and cell signaling.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 protein-function items) with standard 8-item set. Note: 'Maternal effect dominant embryonic arrest' describes a gene phenotype in C. elegans (MATER gene in mammals), not a standard human gene name.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Arylsulfatase B' which is the encoded protein of ARSB) with standard 8-item set. ARSB encodes arylsulfatase B; mutations cause Maroteaux-Lamy syndrome (MPS VI).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 protein-function items) with standard 8-item set. APBB1 encodes amyloid beta precursor protein binding family B member 1, involved in Alzheimer's disease pathology.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 protein-function items) with standard 8-item set. APBB1IP encodes amyloid beta precursor protein binding family B member 1 interacting protein.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 antimicrobial-protein items) with standard 8-item set. BPI encodes bactericidal/permeability-increasing protein, an innate immunity protein that kills gram-negative bacteria.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 protease-function items) with standard 8-item set. MBTPS1 encodes membrane-bound transcription factor peptidase/site 1 protease (S1P), involved in cholesterol and lipid homeostasis.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'RIG-I-like receptor' which describes the DDX58 protein class) with standard 8-item set. DDX58 encodes RIG-I (retinoic acid inducible gene I), an innate immune sensor of viral RNA.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Chimaerin' which is the encoded protein of CHN1) with standard 8-item set. CHN1 encodes chimerin 1 (alpha1-chimaerin); mutations cause Duane retraction syndrome type 2.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 metalloprotease items) with standard 8-item set. ZMPSTE24 encodes a zinc metalloprotease that processes prelamin A; mutations cause Hutchinson-Gilford progeria syndrome variants.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Trifunctional protein alpha subunit' which describes the HADHA protein) with standard 8-item set. HADHA encodes the alpha subunit of mitochondrial trifunctional protein; mutations cause long-chain 3-hydroxyacyl-CoA dehydrogenase deficiency.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Electron transfer flavoprotein dehydrogenase' which is the ETFDH protein) with standard 8-item set. ETFDH mutations cause multiple acyl-CoA dehydrogenase deficiency (glutaric acidemia type II).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 GTPase items) with standard 8-item set. DNM1 encodes dynamin-1, a GTPase involved in membrane tubulation and vesicle fission; mutations cause epileptic encephalopathy.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Dopachrome tautomerase' which is the DCT protein) with standard 8-item set. DCT encodes dopachrome tautomerase (TYRP2), a melanin synthesis enzyme.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Endothelin-converting enzyme' which is the ECE1 protein) with standard 8-item set. ECE1 encodes endothelin-converting enzyme 1, which cleaves big endothelin to active endothelin-1.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 behavioral-protein items) with standard 8-item set. Note: 'fruitless' (fru) is primarily a Drosophila melanogaster sex determination gene; any human ortholog relevance is limited.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. OR2T34 is an olfactory receptor gene, one of ~800 olfactory receptor genes in the human genome.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. OR5AU1 is an olfactory receptor gene.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. OR4C16 is an olfactory receptor gene.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. OR4A16 is an olfactory receptor gene.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. OR10G3 is an olfactory receptor gene.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. OR10H1 is an olfactory receptor gene.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 GTPase items) with standard 8-item set. SAR1A encodes SAR1 GTPase homolog A, involved in COPII vesicle formation; mutations cause chylomicron retention disease.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items including 'Aminomethyltransferase' which is the AMT protein, and 'Serine hydroxymethyltransferase' which is a related but different enzyme) with standard 8-item set. AMT encodes aminomethyltransferase; mutations cause nonketotic hyperglycinemia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items — also note the distractor 'Iduronate sulfatase' is the IDS protein product, not IDUA; IDUA encodes alpha-L-iduronidase) with standard 8-item set. IDUA mutations cause Hurler syndrome (MPS I).

a: A tumor marker (carbohydrate antigen 15-3) elevated in the blood of many breast cancer patients, derived from the MUC1 protein shed from cancer cells
d: A gene that codes for a carcinoma-associated structural protein in breast tissue
A chemotherapy drug targeting the CA 15-3 receptor on breast cancer cells
A serum protein produced by normal mammary gland cells to prevent cancer
A chromosomal mutation causing a hereditary form of breast cancer
An immune checkpoint protein blocking T-cell-mediated tumor killing
A tumor suppressor gene on chromosome 15 associated with breast cancer risk
e: CA 15-3 (Cancer Antigen 15-3) is a circulating tumor marker derived from the extracellular domain of MUC1 (mucin-1), which is shed from the surface of cancer cells into the bloodstream. It is used to monitor treatment response and detect recurrence in patients with metastatic breast cancer, not for initial diagnosis. Elevated levels can also occur in other cancers and some benign conditions.
i: CORRECTION: CA 15-3 is NOT a gene — it is a serum tumor marker/antigen. The original entry falsely classified it as 'a gene found in the human genome.' Completely rewrote as a proper question about what CA 15-3 is. Changed l2 from anatomy_organs to medical_science. New distractors contrast with other cancer-related concepts.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 blood-group protein items) with standard 8-item set. KEL encodes the Kell blood group glycoprotein, an endothelin-3 converting enzyme; Kell alloimmunization can cause hemolytic disease of the fetus.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 coat-color items) with standard 8-item set. FLAG: 'Leopard complex' is an equine coat color phenotype gene (TRPM1 in horses), not a standard human gene — may be incorrectly placed in human health domain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 signaling items) with standard 8-item set. FLAG: 'Lin-12' is a C. elegans gene (nematode), the Notch homolog — it is not a human gene. The human Notch homologs are NOTCH1-4. This entry is incorrectly placed in the human health domain.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 transporter items) with standard 8-item set. CMOAT (canalicular multispecific organic anion transporter) is now known as ABCC2/MRP2; mutations cause Dubin-Johnson syndrome.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 cytokine items) with standard 8-item set. Interleukin 4 (IL4) is the gene encoding IL-4, a cytokine that promotes Th2 immune responses, B-cell activation, and IgE production.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 tight junction items) with standard 8-item set. Occludin (OCLN) is a tight junction protein important in epithelial and endothelial barriers including the blood-brain barrier.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 receptor items) with standard 8-item set. DRD1 encodes dopamine receptor D1, a G-protein coupled receptor that activates adenylyl cyclase and is important in reward pathways.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. PKHD1 encodes fibrocystin/polyductin; mutations cause autosomal recessive polycystic kidney disease (ARPKD).

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 transcription factor items) with standard 8-item set. PAX8 encodes paired box protein 8, a transcription factor essential for thyroid and kidney development.
Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. DRD5 encodes dopamine receptor D5, a D1-like receptor with high constitutive activity.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. DRD3 encodes dopamine receptor D3; it is expressed in limbic regions and is a target for antipsychotic drugs.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 synaptic protein items) with standard 8-item set. Note: 'Sync' as a gene name is not a standard human gene — this may refer to syncytin (ERVW-1) or another poorly named entry.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 transporter items) with standard 8-item set. SLC22A12 encodes the urate transporter URAT1 (OAT4); variants are associated with gout and hyperuricemia.

Fixed l2 from anatomy_organs to genetics_dna. Replaced distractors (only 6 items) with standard 8-item set. FLAG: MatK (maturase K) is a chloroplast gene found in plants, not in the human genome. This entry is incorrectly placed in the human health domain and should be removed.
